commands.review_summary:
The PR expands the bundled Webhooks plugin with configurable authenticated ingress, dynamic Gateway-managed subscriptions, CLI commands, dispatch/delivery modes, completion delivery, and enterprise docs.

PR surface: Source +3563, Tests +2926, Docs +1401. Total +7890 across 34 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR bug from source inspection: completion context is stored before scheduling is accepted and then attached to the next lifecycle start for the same session key. I did not execute a live wrong-run scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair worker can address the concrete completion-correlation bug and docs mismatch on this PR branch before maintainer review resumes.
